message:
Fix CLIP WASM text encoder to match Python reference

- Added linearGGUF function for proper GGUF column-major weight handling
- Updated attention projections and MLP layers to use linearGGUF
- Fixed text projection to use column-major access
- Embeddings now match Python LAION CLIP-ViT-B-32 (cosine similarity ~0.9999)

The key fix was correctly handling GGUF's column-major storage format.
GGUF stores weights as [in_features, out_features] column-major, which
requires special indexing for linear layer computations.
